marketNews.text: Middle East HR Tech market projected to reach $1.89B in 2026, growing 9.2% CAGR — strong tailwind for Talentera.
Saudi Arabia Nitaqat & UAE Emiratisation quotas tightening in 2026 — recruiters must align ATS workflows with nationalization reporting.
43% of organizations now use AI for recruiting tasks (up from 26% in 2024) — companies using AI-powered ATS win talent faster in competitive GCC market.
Online recruitment activity in Middle East surged 53% YoY in Jan 2026, with HR & admin roles up 54% — high inbound opportunity for Talentera.
Saudi oil production expansion creating new hiring demand in O&G sector — target energy & industrial companies in KSA pipeline for Q2 push.
